subject: FW: Tuesday
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Laura Abbott [mailto:laura.abbott@gmail.com] 
Sent: Monday, November 12, 2007 10:28 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Tuesday


Dear Lesley,

I am free to meet with Jeffrey any time tomorrow afternoon, so just let
me know when would be a good time to stop by the office. Could you also
remind me of where you are located? 

Many thanks,
Laura
